/usr/bin/g++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/apk.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/apk.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apk.dir/Emulator/emulator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apk.dir/AbstractCommands/command.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apk.dir/AbstractCommands/time_command.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apk.dir/AbstractCommands/file_command.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apk.dir/AbstractCommands/arg_command.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apk.dir/Commands/date.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apk.dir/Commands/time.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apk.dir/Commands/rm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apk.dir/Commands/touch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apk.dir/Commands/truncate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apk.dir/Commands/echo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apk.dir/Commands/prompt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apk.dir/Commands/wc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apk.dir/Commands/tr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apk.dir/Commands/head.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apk.dir/Commands/batch.cpp.o -o apk
